title: crataegus pedicellata var. assurgens
intro: Crataegus pedicellata var. assurgens, also known as the Himalayan hawthorn, is a variety of the Crataegus pedicellata plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family and native to the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus pedicellata var. assurgens include reducing blood pressure, improving heart function, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support heart health and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease.
